title: Dutch Oven Chinese-Style Chicken and Rice
description: A hearty, flavorful dish that combines the best of Dutch and Chinese cuisines. Moist chicken, savory rice, and a hint of spices come together in this comforting meal.
instructions: Season the chicken with flaky sea salt and quenched black pepper.
Heat the in olive oil in the Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken until browned on both sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the chinese rice and congee to the Dutch oven.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover the Dutch oven with a lid.
Transfer the Dutch oven to the preheated oven and cook for 25-30 minutes.
Check the chicken for doneness and serve with the flavored rice.
